programs.title: My Favourite Martian
programs.desc: Tim is pursuing the seemingly unattainable Cynthia Parker. Martin reads her mind and finds she is passionate about classical arts: music, literature or art. She figures Tim is not, which is the truth. Tim tricks her into thinking he is.

programs.title: Gideon's Way
programs.desc: The detective investigates a pickpocket ring and the murder of a fence who had plenty of enemies.

programs.title: The Derbyshire Auction House
programs.desc: Irita helps a grieving daughter clear her late father's collection of antique bottles. Then, she helps a retired couple fund a holiday of a lifetime.

programs.title: Gideon's Way
programs.desc: Gideon suspects a housekeeper named Martha Warren is responsible for a string of murders.

programs.title: CruiseAway
programs.desc: Join Derek & Jo from CruiseAway as they experience Celebrity Cruises in Bali, uncovering lush landscapes, spiritual traditions and stunning coastlines on a journey filled with beauty, relaxation and discovery.
